# Meeting Follow-up Generator (Uplizd) - Automate post-meeting summaries and action items

## Summary
The Meeting Follow-up Generator is an intelligent Uplizd workflow that streamlines post-meeting communication by automatically transcribing meeting notes, extracting key action items, and drafting personalized follow-up emails via Gmail. By bridging the gap between conversation and execution, this solution ensures no task is forgotten, improves stakeholder alignment, and significantly reduces the manual administrative burden on sales and project management teams.

---
